items.name: AKS Engine for Azure Stack
items.description: AKS Engine provides convenient tooling to quickly bootstrap Kubernetes clusters on Azure Stack. By leveraging ARM (Azure Resource Manager), AKS Engine helps create, destroy and maintain clusters provisioned with basic IaaS resources in Azure Stack.

items.name: Alibaba Cloud Container Service for Kubernetes
items.description: Alibaba Cloud Container Service for Kubernetes (ACK) is a fully-managed service compatible with Kubernetes to help users focus on their applications rather than managing container infrastructure.

items.name: Amazon Elastic Container Service for Kubernetes (EKS)
items.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service for Kubernetes (Amazon EKS) is a managed service that makes it easy for you to run Kubernetes on AWS without needing to install and operate your own Kubernetes clusters.

items.name: ARDC Nectar Research Cloud Magnum Service
items.description: Get started with Kubernetes easily with Nectar Research Cloud Magnum Service.

items.name: Aruba Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Aruba Managed Kubernetes is the easiest way to manage your kubernetes clusters.

items.name: Avisi AME
items.description: AME provides a managed Kubernetes platform that delivers seamless, easy, and secure production-ready cluster management across public, private, and hybrid cloud environments.

items.name: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
items.description: Simplify the deployment, management, and operations of Kubernetes. Use a fully managed Kubernetes container orchestration service or choose other orchestrators.

items.name: Baidu Cloud Container Engine
items.description: Baidu Cloud Container Engine, aka CCE.

items.name: Breqwatr BKS
items.description: BKS is a hosted Kubernetes service on OpenStack, leveraging Cluster API to manage Kubernetes cluster lifecycle.

items.name: Catalyst Kubernetes Service
items.description: Catalyst Kubernetes Service makes it easy for you to deploy, manage, and scale Kubernetes clusters to run containerised applications on the Catalyst Cloud.

items.name: China Mobile KCS
items.description: Ecloud Kubernetes Container Service（KCS）provides high-performance and reliable container application management capabilities. It simplifies the establishment of a cloud operating environment for container applications and provides a complete cloud operating environment for applications.

items.name: Civo Kubernetes
items.description: The first cloud native service provider powered only by Kubernetes

items.name: Conoa Proact Managed Container Platform
items.description: Full stack managed Kubernetes platform which lets you focus on your application, we'll do the rest!

items.name: Control Plane Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Control Plane Managed Kubernetes is a service that creates and manages Kubernetes clusters across multiple cloud platforms and on-prem environments.

items.name: CoreWeave Kubernetes Service (CKS)
items.description: CKS is a managed Kubernetes environment purpose-built for building, training, and deploying AI applications.

items.name: CYSO Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Simplify your cloud-native journey with Managed Kubernetes. Powered by Gardener, deploy, manage, and scale your containerized apps effortlessly on Cyso Cloud and beyond—all GDPR compliant.

items.name: DG-i Kubernetes Platform
items.description: The DG-i Kubernetes Platform is a curated and production-proven solution for our fully managed service for regulated environments including monitoring, logging and audit-ready operations across the DG-i private cloud, on-premise installations or in a multi-cloud environment.

items.name: DigitalOcean Kubernetes
items.description: DigitalOcean Kubernetes is designed for developers who want a simple and cost effective way to deploy container workloads to a managed Kubernetes service.

items.name: Elastx Private Kubernetes
items.description: Elastx delivers a fully managed, production-grade Kubernetes platform built for high availability, performance, and digital sovereignty. Running distributed across three data centers in Sweden - ensuring full control, data residency, and security compliance.

items.name: Exoscale Scalable Kubernetes Service
items.description: Scalable, On-demand Kubernetes Clusters on a privacy minded public cloud to host from simple applications to complex architectures.  Deploy a production ready cluster in 90 seconds and manage it with a simple web portal, CLI, API or your choice of tools like Terraform.

items.name: Gcore Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Gcore Managed Kubernetes is a service that lets you deploy Kubernetes clusters without the complexities of handling the control plane and containerized infrastructure.

items.name: Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE)
items.description: GKE is an enterprise-grade platform for containerized applications, including stateful and stateless, AI and ML, Linux and Windows, complex and simple web apps, API, and backend services.

items.name: Hikube
items.description: Hikube’s Managed Kubernetes provides a fully managed, multi-datacenter Kubernetes environment distributed across three Swiss sites, ensuring cluster redundancy, automated updates, integrated monitoring, and secure networking for production-grade workloads.

items.name: Huawei Cloud Container Engine (CCE)
items.description: Cloud Container Engine (CCE) is a high-performance, high-reliability service through which enterprises can manage containerized applications. CCE supports native Kubernetes applications and tools, allowing you to set up a container runtime environment on the cloud with ease.

items.name: IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service
items.description: IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service is a managed offering to create your own Kubernetes cluster of compute hosts to deploy and manage containerized apps on IBM Cloud.

items.name: IONOS Cloud Managed Kubernetes
items.description: IONOS Cloud Managed Kubernetes is the ideal platform for automating the deployment, scaling and management of highly scalable and demanding containerized applications.

items.name: Leaseweb Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Leaseweb Managed Kubernetes takes care of the Installation, Monitoring, and Maintenance of the Kubernetes control plane. Leaseweb also manages the underlying equipment and network infrastructure, making Kubernetes easy and efficient.

items.name: Linode Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Linode Kubernetes Engine is a fast and simple way to deploy, scale, and manage Kubernetes clusters running on Linode's global infrastructure.

items.name: Metal Stack Cloud Kubernetes
items.description: Metal Stack Cloud Kubernetes is a fully managed and scalable Kubernetes service for the deployment and management of Kubernetes clusters and containerized applications.

items.name: NETWAYS Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Build, deploy, and scale flexibly with NETWAYS Managed Kubernetes powered by OpenStack.

items.name: NHN Kubernetes Service (NKS)
items.description: NKS(NHN Kubernetes Service) is a managed Kubernetes service that allows you to easily deploy a Kubernetes cluster in NHN Cloud.

items.name: Nirmata Managed Kubernetes
items.description: Simplify Day 2 operations and management for Kubernetes with a unified management plane across all your clusters and workloads.

items.name: OKESTRO VIOLA
items.description: VIOLA is a managed Kubernetes service that allows you to easily deploy a Kubernetes cluster in Okestro.

items.name: Oracle Kubernetes Engine (OKE)
items.description: Simplify operations of enterprise-grade Kubernetes at scale. Easily deploy and manage resource-intensive workloads such as AI with automatic scaling, patching, and upgrades.

items.name: Orka
items.description: Orka is a platform that allows Orchestration via Kubernetes on Apple. It allows MacOS on genuine Apple hardware to be used in Kubernetes.

items.name: OVH Managed Kubernetes Service
items.description: Benefit from free HA managed Kubernetes service by hosting your nodes and services on OVH Public Cloud.

items.name: plusserver Kubernetes Engine (PSKE)
items.description: The plusserver Kubernetes Engine (PSKE) based on Gardener reduces the complexity in managing multi-cloud environments and enables companies to orchestrate their containers and cloud-native applications across a variety of platforms such as plusserver’s pluscloud open or hyperscalers such as AWS, either by mouseclick or via an API.

items.name: Previder Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Previder Kubernetes Engine is a managed Kubernetes service to help users focus on their development as we take care of the maintenance and updates of the container infrastructure

items.name: QingCloud Kubernetes Engine (QKE)
items.description: QKE can provision a K8s/KubeSphere cluster in minutes automatically by just a few clicks and inputs.

items.name: Rafay
items.description: Rafay Systems enables DevOps and SRE teams to automate application lifecycle and cluster configuration management across on-premise and cloud-based Kubernetes clusters through a turnkey SaaS platform.

items.name: Red Hat OpenShift Dedicated
items.description: OpenShift® Dedicated helps organizations focus on building and scaling their business with a private Kubernetes cluster fully-managed by Red Hat®.

items.name: Red Hat OpenShift on IBM Cloud
items.description: Red Hat OpenShift on IBM Cloud is a managed offering to create your own OpenShift cluster of compute hosts to deploy and manage containerized apps on IBM Cloud.

items.name: Samsung Kubernetes Engine (SKE)
items.description: SKE offers lightweight virtual computing containers and clusters for their management. With the service, Kubernetes environments are readily available by installation, operation, and maintenance of the Kubernetes control plane.

items.name: SAP Certified Gardener
items.description: The Gardener implements automated management and operation of Kubernetes clusters as a service and aims to support that service on multiple Cloud providers.

items.name: Scaleway Kubernetes Kapsule
items.description: Kubernetes Kapsule provides a simple way to deploy and manage your containerized applications in the cloud. Relax and focus on your software stack while we take care of your clusters.

items.name: STACKIT Kubernetes Engine
items.description: STACKIT Kubernetes Engine (SKE) is a fully managed and scalable Kubernetes service for the deployment and management of Kubernetes  clusters and containerized applications.

items.name: StarlingX
items.description: StarlingX is a fully integrated open source edge platform that integrates OpenStack and Kubernetes together to provide all functionality needed in the central cloud and on the edge sites. The project is developed by the StarlingX community.

items.name: Swisscom Kubernetes Service
items.description: Kubernetes Service is a managed Kubernetes offering in Swisscom’s Private Cloud, based on open-source technology and CNCF tools.

items.name: Switch Cloud Kubernetes (SCK)
items.description: Switch Cloud Kubernetes (SCK) is a Kubernetes as a Service platform for the education, research and innovation landscape in Switzerland.

items.name: SysEleven MetaKube
items.description: MetaKube offers carefree Multi Cloud Kubernetes as a Service on OpenStack Cloud, Amazon Web Services (AWS) and On-Premises. We provide you with SaaS solutions like a load balancer as well as solutions for backup and recovery, monitoring, etc., and various types of support - detailed documentation, tutorials and personal SRE-Support.

items.name: Tata Communications Vayu Kubernetes Service
items.description: Tata Communications Vayu Kubernetes Service is an enterprise-grade managed service that makes it easy for you to run Kubernetes on Tata Communications  Vayu Cloud platform without needing to install and operate your own Kubernetes clusters, for running containerized applications, including stateful  and stateless, AI and ML, complex and simple web apps, API, and backend services. Service is available only India for consumption.

items.name: Tencent Kubernetes Engine (TKE)
items.description: Tencent Kubernetes Engine (TKE) provides container-centric, highly scalable and high-performance container management services. Fully compatible with Kubernetes' native API and capable of expanding Tencent Cloud's Kubernetes plugins such as CBS and CLB.

items.name: Unicom Cloud Container Service for Kubernetes (CSK)
items.description: Chinaunicom container service product based on Kubernetes. It provides high-performance and scalable container application management capabilities, supporting the full lifecycle management of enterprise-level Kubernetes containerized applications

items.name: UpCloud Managed Kubernetes
items.description: UpCloud Managed Kubernetes automates the deployment, scaling and management of container workloads.

items.name: Viettel Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Viettel Kubernetes Engine is a fully managed Kubernetes service that enables you to deploy and operate Kubernetes clusters on the Viettel Cloud platform.

items.name: Volcengine Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Volcengine Kubernetes Engine(VKE) is a Kubernetes-based service that provides high-performance container cluster management. By deeply integrating the new generation of cloud-native technologies, VKE ensures high efficiency for enterprises through running containerized applications on the cloud

items.name: Vultr Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Vultr Kubernetes Engine gives developers a simple way to deploy containerized workloads with predictable pricing on a fully-managed Kubernetes cluster that integrates with other Vultr managed services such as Load Balancers, Block Storage, and DNS.

items.name: WKS - Wiit Kubernetes Service
items.description: The reliable container platform managed by WIIT.

items.name: ZTE TECS OpenPalette
items.description: The TECS OpenPalette platform is a unified cloud platform oriented to the ICT realm.
